ip_outcome_note: Card name directly names the depicted character. Confirmed via Bandai official listing, God trait, Future Trunks Saga era stamp, and the green skin / white hair visual identifiers matching Zamasu's canonical appearance. Frontmatter updated: ip_verified: true.

trivia_bullets.text: BT2-057 is from Union Force (DBS-B02), released November 3, 2017. BT2 introduced Zamasu and Goku Black as a new Blue-color villain archetype. Bandai included a dedicated Fused Zamasu deck list in the official strategy content with BT2-057 listed as a 4-copy staple.
sources: dbs-cardgame.com: Union Force Fused Zamasu deck strategy page

trivia_bullets.text: Blue Battle card, Uncommon, power 15,000, energy cost 4 (reduced by 1 with a Zamasu or Goku Black Leader). God trait. Permanent Indestructible: cannot be KO'd by opponent card skills or battle and does not leave the Battle Area. Energy reduction + Indestructible directly mirror Zamasu's canonical in-universe immortality from the Future Trunks Saga — a card that cannot be permanently removed, for a character who cannot be permanently killed.
sources: dbs-cardgame.com: BT2 Fused Zamasu deck list

trivia_bullets.text: Zamasu is the primary villain of Dragon Ball Super's Future Trunks Saga (DBS episodes 47-76, 2016-2017): a former Supreme Kai apprentice who develops a mortal-extermination ideology ('Zero Mortals Plan'), uses the Super Dragon Balls to steal Goku's body (becoming Goku Black), and wishes for Future-Zamasu's immortality. The two later merge into Fused Zamasu. Ultimately required Zeno's erasure of the entire future timeline to defeat — the only DBS villain whose defeat required timeline destruction rather than conventional combat.
sources: Kanzenshuu: Future Trunks arc episode guide
Wikipedia: Dragon Ball Super Future Trunks Saga (search snippet)

trivia_bullets.text: BT2-057 is the corpus's only Zamasu card and the primary anchor for the xenoverse-villains cluster context. The Indestructible mechanic encodes the 'divine villain who cannot be normally defeated' concept — Fused Zamasu's ultimate resolution required Zeno's timeline erasure precisely because standard combat could not permanently remove him.

related_cards.name: Warrior of the Gods Goku Black

related_cards.name: Father-Son Galick Gun
